Center: OECD/NEA Nuclear Data Bank, Boulogne-Billancourt, France
title: Nuclear cross-section of proton-induced reactions on enriched 48Ti targets for the production of theranostic 47Sc radionuclide, 46cSc, 44mSc, 44gSc, 43Sc, and 48V

x4freetext: Nuclear cross-section of proton-induced reactions on
enriched 48Ti targets for the production of
theranostic 47Sc radionuclide, 46cSc, 44mSc, 44gSc,
43Sc, and 48V

x4codes.hlp: INFN Laboratori Nazionali di Legnaro, Legnaro, Padova, Italy
Universita degli Studi di Padova + INFN Padova, Italy

x4freetext: Istituto Oncologico Veneto IOV-IRCCS, Padova

flag.hlp: Reference to related data compiled in another entry

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nucl. Instrum. Methods in Physics Res., Sect.B, Vol.219-220, p.1027 (2004)

x4freetext: The maximum beam energy uncertainty value was
determined using the SRIM2003 code.
ARRONAX facility
18-70 MeV low current (100-130 nA) proton beam
48Ti target, a natNi monitor
(10 or 25 um thick) with purity >99%.
detector (10% relative efficiency, FWHM 1.0 keV
at 122 keV Canberra GC1020)
Thick Al foils (500 um thick) used as
in the stacked structure.
The irradiation had a duration of 50-90 min.
For short living nuclides acquisitions was 15 min and
was performed ~2-4 hrs after end of bombardment (EOB).
Each 48Ti sample measured overnight with a
acquisitions time (~8-14 hrs). The gamma- spectroscopy
measurement repeated each day up to 5 days after EOB
with a acquisitions time 1.5-3 hrs.

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Data Sheets, Vol.148, p.338 (2018)

x4freetext: The uncertainty on the extracted proton
beam (+/- 500 keV) and the energy straggling,
calculated with SRIM.

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: No information on sources of uncertainties.
Error in the monitor cross section.
